sharedInstructions: Be explicit about whether A2B felt smooth. If there are disconnects, stale targets, timeout errors, or manual recovery, record them even if the task later succeeds.

tasks.name: Weather Search
tasks.prompt: Use A2B to open or select a browser tab and find the current weather for Shanghai. Prefer A2B high-level commands. Only fall back to run-js if needed.

tasks.name: Finance News Crawl
tasks.prompt: Use A2B to gather several current finance headlines from a news or finance site. Prefer A2B high-level commands. Only fall back to run-js if needed.
